headline: ADR-018 sterilization teardown COMPLETE + pushed green on claude/storybook-publishable-9tdovm (epic #80), awaiting lead review before merge. #51 legacy docs SPA stripped → Storybook-only (resolves #56); #49 portfolio deleted (apps/concrete + 47MB public/assets, archived on archive/portfolio); #50 local-AI bot layer cut (Modelfile/llm-stream-bridge/codemods/claude-config/docs-ai/AGENTS.md, archived on archive/local-ai) with llms.txt generation RETAINED per Adrian as core DS self-documentation; #53 root-doc sprawl consolidated 25→15 (10 stale deleted, durable content salvaged, 0 dangling doc-refs). CLAUDE.md leaned, guardrail registry pruned, ADR-018 §1/§3/§7 amended. #60 Phase 1 (variant contract) landed on the same branch: docs/architecture/variant-contract.md written, check-prop-vocabulary.mjs gained rules C (tone ⊆ neutral|danger|success|warning|info) + D (density ⊆ comfortable|compact) plus an informational --coverage tracker (28/123 primitives on cva, up from 22/123); 4 pre-existing tone-vocab violations surfaced by rule C (callout/card/controls-panel/doc-page-header) exempted with // vocab-ok pending their own rollout phase; 6-component reference batch converted to cva (tag, divider, stat, field, avatar-group, circular-progress — stat/field renamed tone 'default'→'neutral'). Every commit green: typecheck, lint --max-warnings=0, build:lib, build-storybook, vitest (1065), check-prop-vocabulary, pretest, check:size.
next: Lead review of the teardown + #60-Phase-1 branch (9 commits ahead of main), then merge. Attended — not yet merged.

#60 Phase 2+: convert remaining non-cva src/app/components primitives in batches — see the Phase 1 commit message / PR description for the proposed grouping (simple display primitives next, then interactive form controls, then complex composite components last).

Deeper 'docs → 5' collapse: requires unwiring ~11 doc-generation/guardrail scripts (DESIGN-HANDOFF/CONSUMING/TOKEN_GOVERNANCE/SYSTEMS_REGISTRY/DECISIONS/OPERATING_MAP/TOKEN_MIGRATION generators). Deferred.

Non-blocking hygiene from #51: reconcile the 13 pre-existing check-validator-wiring drifts; prune stale paths from knip.config.ts; decide check-reduced-motion Layer-2 semantics for a library (no App.tsx root).
Deferred: #64 (Astro evaluation). Human-owned: #47 (Figma Code Connect), #48 Figma text-style swap.
